variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11811 K Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 11811 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11811 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11811 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 192.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 155.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 90.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 292.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 280.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P181093 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11811 K
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P181093 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11811 K
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 16 210 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11811 K
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 16 210 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11811 K
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 154.0 mm, Dimension B: 89.0 mm, Dimension C: 17.0 mm, Dimension D: 154.0 mm, Dimension E: 200.0 mm, Dimension H: 290.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1861K Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11811 K
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1861K Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11811 K
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1861K axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
